{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Li clan Matriarch
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan Matriarch]] is a gray-haired woman wearing an [[emerald]]-set silver tiara and rings on each finger.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
